title: Initial FTS approach (custom inverted index in R2)
context: We considered building a custom inverted index served from R2 to avoid taking on a relational store.
decision: Initially: build a Lucene-style index manually, sharded by user id, stored as JSON in R2.
consequences: Avoids a new datastore; pushes index maintenance complexity into the Worker; cold queries get expensive on a large corpus.

alternativesConsidered.name: D1 FTS5
alternativesConsidered.summary: SQLite FTS5 hosted on Cloudflare D1.
alternativesConsidered.reasonNotChosen: At the time, D1 was beta and not deemed production-ready.
